name: designer
description: Design plugin — ships the designer subagent: a product/UI design specialist that is ULTRA-effective at design systems, Figma and Paper.design canvases, typography, accessibility, and design-to-dev handoff. Bundles seven skills (design-foundations, design-systems-craft, figma-craft, paper-craft, accessibility-craft, design-handoff, ux-principles) and exploits the Figma and Paper.design MCP servers.
